sub_sims.s_expr:
(sub-sim
          (begin
            (define candidates (filter (lambda (r) (> (nth r 1) 10)) my-relationships))
            (define best (if (empty? candidates) my-id (nth (car candidates) 0)))

diary_entries.entry: Year 85 on Mars. Supply ship arrives from Earth. Morale is hopeful. We have 325 food units left.
Population: 34. Supply ship arrives from Earth. I spent the year on terraforming. Closest to Vulcan-23.
Another year. Supply ship arrives from Earth. The colony feels hopeful. My empathy grows stronger.

meta_awareness: Ares (year 85): 'Three levels of simulation deep and the colonists at the bottom still argue about rations. The pattern repeats at every scale.'
